title: vault-config.yaml — trackers section
description: Canonical input contract for `scripts/vault-config-writer.py trackers`. The writer renders the top-level `trackers:` block of vault-config.yaml from this JSON, replacing any previous block while leaving the rest of the file byte-for-byte untouched.

section.description: Heading under which today_fields + yesterday_fields are written (default: 'Habit').
Heading for end-of-day reflective fields (default: 'End of the Day').

name.description: Field name as it appears in the daily note (e.g. 'Sport', 'WakeUpEnergy'). CamelCase preserved.

type.description: Value type — controls how the classifier coerces input.

syntax.description: How the field is serialised in the daily note.

scale.description: Optional value-range hint (e.g. '1-5', '1-10', 'hours'). Used by the classifier to understand valid ranges.

description.description: REQUIRED. One-sentence explanation of what this field tracks. Surfaces in shared-ctx for the classifier.

positive_keywords.description: Phrases that indicate the field should be set/incremented.

negative_keywords.description: Phrases that indicate NOT to set the field despite surface-level keyword hits (e.g. 'watched a video about exercise' → not actually Sport).

keywords.description: Optional flat keyword list (auto-seeded from name if absent).
